title: eragrostis cilianensis var. starosselskyi
intro: Eragrostis cilianensis var. starosselskyi is a type of grass commonly known as wood false brome. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for reducing swelling and fighting off infections. Wood false brome is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures, which are said to provide relief from respiratory issues and skin conditions, as well as promote overall health and well-being.
